problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
